_comment: Canonical CaseModel document shape. g8ee is the authority — it creates and owns this document in its SQLite store. g8ed reads it via g8ee HTTP API to render case lists and the dashboard. A field mismatch breaks case creation, status updates, and investigation linkage.
_consumers: g8ed (JS — renders case list/detail, creates cases via g8ee API)

case._description: Full case document as stored in g8ee SQLite and returned by g8ee case endpoints.

id.description: Unique case identifier (UUID v4). Always generated server-side by g8ee — never accepted from client.

title.description: Case title. AI-generated from initial_message. 1-500 chars.

user_id.description: User who created the case. Injected server-side by g8ed from authenticated session.

user_email.description: Email of the user who created the case. Injected by g8ed from session.

status.description: Case lifecycle status. See status.json case.status.

priority.description: Priority level (integer enum). Maps to low=1, medium=2, high=3, critical=4.

severity.description: Severity level (integer enum). Maps to low=1, medium=2, high=3, critical=4.

web_session_id.description: Browser session ID at time of case creation. Injected by g8ed.

source.description: Source system or channel that originated the case

assignee.description: User or component currently assigned to this case

investigation_id.description: Associated investigation ID. Set when an investigation is created for this case.

last_processed_by.description: Name of the last component to process this case (e.g. g8ee, g8ed)

attachments.description: List of Google Cloud Storage URLs for files attached to the case

history_trail.description: Chronological log of key case events

event_type.description: Event type string. See events.json case.*.

source_component.description: Component that initiated the event. See status.json component.name.

case_create_request._description: Request body for POST /api/cases (g8ed → g8ee). Fields marked server-injected are populated by g8ed from the authenticated session before forwarding to G8EE.

initial_message.description: The user's initial message. g8ee generates title and description from this.
